feed.title: Pouget Lab
feed.subtitle: The Pouget Lab uses cutting-edge computational genomics to uncover how genetic variation shapes brain development and vulnerability to psychiatric disorders. By integrating multi-omic data from the brain, our team aims to pinpoint the molecular mechanisms underlying psychosis and translate these discoveries into earlier, more personalized interventions for youth mental health.

entry.title: 2026 CAMH Undergraduate Research Awards
entry.content:
Congratulations to Brianna Dryburgh and Agam Hans

Brianna and Agam received CAMH Undergraduate Research Awards to support their summer projects in the lab. We are excited to have them join the lab, and look forward to supporting their development as emerging scientists. Congratulations Brianna and Agam on this well deserved achievement!
entry.summary: Congratulations to Brianna Dryburgh and Agam Hans
